history.content:
<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B facing right ('>'). The goal is at row 04 column D. To reach the goal, I need to move forward and navigate around the lava cells at C3 and C4. Moving forward to C2 is safe for now.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column C facing right ('>'). Ahead is cell 02 column D, which is floor ('.'), safe to move forward. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 02 column D facing right ('>'). The next cell in front, 02 column E, is a wall ('#'), so I cannot move forward. To get closer to the goal at row 04 column D, I should turn right to face down ('v').
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing down ('v'). The cell in front is row 03 column D which is floor ('.'), safe to move forward towards the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 03 column D facing down ('v'). The cell in front is row 04 column D, which contains the goal ('G'). I should move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
